feedItems.description: allocated £19.2m to Environment & Streets (≈£104 per resident)
allocated £41.9m to Children's Social Care (≈£226 per resident)
allocated £65.2m to Adult Social Care (≈£352 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £105 (5.1%) to £2155
